rationale: The two ensures-conjuncts for r1 and r2 contain `forall|i|` quantifiers with disjoint auto-triggers, so z3 never lines them up. Re-asserting each ensures conjunct forces Verus to instantiate the quantifiers with matching triggers, after which both r1.0 and r2.0 are seen to equal the same forall-expression (so r1.0 == r2.0), and likewise r1.1 == r2.1 when .0 is false.
